data.name: BR -> TW (BRL->NTD directed edge)
data.feasibility_class: Regime-in-transition (destination regime adopted, not yet operative; resolves to Category II at pending (contingent, no gazetted date))

infrastructure_overlap.note: BR on no shared wholesale-settlement experiment; TW on no shared wholesale-settlement experiment. At least one end off the shared experiments.

inbound_mechanism.test: Virtual Asset Service Act enacted 2026-06-30; FSC-approval inbound gate on commencement

contingent.basis: Virtual Asset Service Act: issuance and the inbound treatment of offshore stablecoins are conditioned on approval by the FSC AND the Central Bank of the Republic of China (Taiwan) -- dual approval, not FSC-with-CBC-consulted. Issuer-paid yield is prohibited. Roughly a 21-month operator transition.

class_basis.instrument: Virtual Asset Service Act: issuance and the inbound treatment of offshore stablecoins are conditioned on approval by the FSC AND the Central Bank of the Republic of China (Taiwan) -- dual approval, not FSC-with-CBC-consulted. Issuer-paid yield is prohibited. Roughly a 21-month operator transition.

record_ref_meta.note: `tw-frs-monetary_sovereignty-001` still cites the 'draft Virtual Asset Service Act'. The Act was passed at third reading on 2026-06-30 and is enacted, not draft. The signal is correct and the record's source prose is stale — the node-record face of finding F-TW. Recorded here rather than silently corrected: a legal record is edited by a verification pass, not by a build script.
